zh.lifeSummary: 當Ludwig I von Eberstein於大約1200年出生在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 霍爾茲明登時，他的父親Otto I, Graf von Eberstein31歲，母親Beatrix von Krautheim-19歲。他於從1225年1月8日到1226年1月7日與Gräfin Adelheid von Gleichen在巴登結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1284年9月15日在他的家鄉享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ludwig I von Eberstein于大约1200年出生在德国尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 霍爾茲明登时，他的父亲Otto I, Graf von Eberstein31岁，母亲Beatrix von Krautheim-19岁。他于从1225年1月8日到1226年1月7日与Gräfin Adelheid von Gleichen在巴登结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1284年9月15日在他的家乡享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Eberstein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: topographic name from Middle High German ober ‘upper’ + stein ‘rock, stone’, also ‘castle’, hence a habitational or topographic name from the place Idar-Oberstein in Rhineland-Palatinate with the latter part of the name taken from a rock above the town.

nameMeanings.name: Ludwig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from hlud ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’; an ancient royal and imperial name. See Louis .

variants.name: Louis
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

en.lifeSummary: When Ludwig I von Eberstein was born about 1200, in Holzminden, Lower Saxony, Germany, his father, Otto I, Graf von Eberstein, was 31 and his mother, Beatrix von Krautheim, was -19. He married Gräfin Adelheid von Gleichen from 8 January 1225 to 7 January 1226, in Baden. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 15 September 1284, in his hometown, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ludwig I von Eberstein est né environ 1200, à Landkreis Holzminden, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, son père, Otto I, Graf von Eberstein, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Beatrix von Krautheim, avait -19 ans. Il a épousé Gräfin Adelheid von Gleichen du 8 janvier 1225 au 7 janvier 1226, à Baden. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 15 septembre 1284, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ludwig I von Eberstein um 1200 in Landkreis Holzminden, Niedersachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Otto I, Graf von Eberstein 31 und seine Mutter Beatrix von Krautheim -19. Er hat von 8. Januar 1225 bis 7. Januar 1226 in Baden Gräfin Adelheid von Gleichen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. September 1284 im Alter von 85 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ludwig I von Eberstein è nato il circa 1200 nel Landkreis Holzminden, Niedersachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Otto I, Graf von Eberstein, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Beatrix von Krautheim, aveva -19 anni. Lui sposato Gräfin Adelheid von Gleichen da 8 gennaio 1225 a 7 gennaio 1226, nel Baden. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 settembre 1284, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 85 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ludwig I von Ebersteinが約1200年にドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス ホールズミンデンで生まれた時，父Otto I, Graf von Ebersteinは31歳，母Beatrix von Krautheimは-19歳であった。から1225年1月8日まで1226年1月7日にバデンでGräfin Adelheid von Gleichenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1284年9月15日に故郷で85歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ludwig I von Eberstein(이)가 대략 1200년 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 홀즈민든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Otto I, Graf von Eberstein(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrix von Krautheim(은)는 -19세였다. 그는 1225년 1월 8일부터 1226년 1월 7일까지 바든에서 Gräfin Adelheid von Gleichen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1284년 9월 15일 그의 고향에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ludwig I von Eberstein nasceu aproximadamente 1200, em Landkreis Holzminden, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Otto I, Graf von Eberstein, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix von Krautheim, tinha -19 anos. Ele casou-se com Gräfin Adelheid von Gleichen de 8 de janeiro de 1225 a 7 de janeiro de 1226, em Baden. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de setembro de 1284, em sua cidade natal, com 85 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ludwig I von Eberstein родился около 1200 г. в местности ландкрис холзминден, ниедирсачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Otto I, Graf von Eberstein было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Beatrix von Krautheim, -19. Он женился на женщине по имени Gräfin Adelheid von Gleichen с 8 января 1225 по 7 января 1226 в местности баден. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 15 сентября 1284 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 85 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ludwig I von Eberstein nació aproximadamente 1200, en Landkreis Holzminden, Niedersachsen, Alemania, su papá, Otto I, Graf von Eberstein, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Beatrix von Krautheim, tenía -19 años. Se casó con Gräfin Adelheid von Gleichen desde 8 de enero de 1225 hasta 7 de enero de 1226, en Baden. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de septiembre de 1284, en su pueblo, a la edad de 85 años.
